---
title: "This site — why and how"
description: "A short intro to the portfolio and the tools behind it."
author: "A. Naya"
date: "2026-06-23"
categories: [Meta, Quarto]
---

Welcome! This is where I gather my work in environmental data science.
The site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), so my existing
`.qmd` analyses can be embedded directly.

## What you'll find here

- **Projects** – apps, analyses and a QGIS plugin
- **Blog** – short notes on methods and tools

To replace this post: create a new folder under `blog/posts/`, copy this
`index.qmd` and adapt its content.

### Code blocks are rendered

```r
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) + geom_point()
```
